---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when I try to visualize AVL trees..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. E.g., add balancing animations for AVL trees in the BST visualizer.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Visual Layout Idea**
Describe how this feature should look in the UI (e.g. side panel buttons, console updates, animation color codes).

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
